/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Wpedantic -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-function -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_data_structures.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_data_structures.dir/DataStructures/Tests/test_scheme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_data_structures.dir/DataStructures/Tests/test_metadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_data_structures.dir/DataStructures/Tests/test_column.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_data_structures.dir/DataStructures/Tests/test_batch.cpp.o -o test_data_structures  libdata_structures.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
